rationale: Iran deal remains the top US-relevant story with direct policy and market implications; Tren de Aragua killing and Anthropic suspension are continuations of known patterns.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Conflicting US-Iran signals on deal timing create ongoing uncertainty for oil markets and US Middle East policy. Direct relevance to US residents via energy prices and geopolitical risk.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: US confirms airstrike killing of Tren de Aragua leader — continuation of Trump administration's anti-gang military operations. Domestic security optics but no new policy shift.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic's AI tool suspension under federal security review continues as active policy. Affects US tech sector and AI development pace but remains a known ongoing situation.
